channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Legendary Jungler Diamondprox Returns to LoL Esports in EMEA Masters
item.content:encoded:
One of the pioneers of LoL esports, legendary jungler Danil ‘Diamondprox’ Reshetnikov, is briefly returning to competitive League of Legends at EMEA Masters Winter 2026.

The former pro was an emergency substitute for the Turkish LoL team Bushido Wildcats in the Lower Bracket match against Vantex Esports, where a loss will spell elimination from the competition.

The Russian jungler filled in for Turkish pro Taha ‘Elramir’ Yurdagüven, who is missing the match due to personal reasons after his mother suffered a heart attack.

Diamondprox hasn’t participated in LoL Esports at a professional level since 2024 after filling in for EGN Esports at EMEA Masters Summer. The Russian pro has continued to participate in smaller tournaments but seemingly hasn’t been part of a team for longer than a month since 2022.

This year’s Winter EM tournament is slightly higher stakes as the top two teams will qualify for the Esports World Cup Qualifier and then compete with LEC teams to try and qualify for the big-money LoL tournament at the Saudi Arabian event featuring the world’s best teams.

The 33-year-old DiamondProx has shown he still has it as he helped Bushido Wildcats defeat Vantex. He finished the first match with a 7/0/9 KDA as the team finished the game with a 13k gold lead. The Turkish team then dominated the second game to win 2-0 and keep their EM campaign alive.

Diamondprox’s LoL Esports Legacy

Diamondprox revolutionised the jungle role in the early days of LoL esports while competing for Moscow Five in 2012.

He essentially invented ‘priority’ in the MOBA, focusing on champions that could clear extremely quickly and having his teammates select winning lanes that could push quickly.

This allowed Diamondprox and M5 to catch out teams, constantly being first to act and allowing the jungler to invade his opponent while they were still trying to complete their first clear.

Lane priority, invading, and timing camps can all be attributed to his pioneering playstyle of being aggressive and exerting lots of early-game pressure.

Who was the first LoL esports player you became a fan of? Let us know in the Insider Gaming Discord.

Meanwhile, other retired LoL pros are keeping busy like Odoamne, who has joined Fnatic’s LEC coaching staff.

MOBILE APP

item.title: LOL Worlds 2027 Tentative Dates Shared by KeSPA as Host City Search Begins
item.content:encoded:
The first details of the 2027 League of Legends World Championship have been revealed by the Korea e-Sports Association (KeSPA).

Riot Games had already confirmed that next year’s LoL Worlds tournament will take place in South Korea and now KeSPA is looking to lock in host cities for the major esports event.

Local Korean governments hoping to host any of the tournament are requested to email KeSPA by April 6, 2026. The organisation also expects at least 10,000 live fans for the final.

Interestingly, KeSPA only mentions the Knockout Stages as needing a host city, which could potentially mean that a venue has already been secured for the Play-In and Swiss Stages.

This likely means that the early stages of tournaments will be held in Riot’s own LoL Park venue in Seoul, a small venue much like the Riot Games Arena in Berlin, which was used for the same stage of LoL Worlds 2024.

South Korea has hosted three LoL World Championships in the past: 2014, 2018, and 2023, with Seoul, Busan, Gwangju, and Incheon having all hosted LoL Worlds games in the past.

LoL Worlds 2026 USA Doubts

Before the 2027 iteration, this year’s LoL Worlds tournament will be hosted in the United States of America, with the final hosted in New York City and the rest of the tournament taking place in Allen, Texas.

America is a polarising choice as a host nation, with mounting political tensions involving US Immigration Customs Enforcement (ICE) and Donald Trump, leaving some with doubts on how safe it is to visit the country.

Visa issues have also stopped various esports and traditional sports athletes from participating in US-based events, like Canadian LoL top laner ‘ZamudoFrankie’ Lin, who has been unable to compete in the LCS despite joining LYON earlier in the year.

LoL Worlds 2027 First Details

According to KeSPA, the tentative dates for next year’s LoL Worlds Championships are Friday, October 15, 2027, to Sunday, November 14, 2027.

The Quarterfinals and Semifinals are set to take place between Tuesday, November 2 and Sunday, November 9, 2027.

LoL Worlds 2027 will apparently have a prize pool of $5m USD, excluding skin sales, and it will seemingly follow the usual format of a Swiss Stage leading into the brutal single-elimination Knockout Stages.

Where would you like to see LoL Worlds hosted? Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord.

And find out why China’s LPL has attracted its largest audience of LoL fans in years.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Borderlands 4 Story Pack 1 Release Date Revealed
item.content:encoded:
Gearbox has announced that Borderlands 4’s Story Pack 1, Mad Ellie and the Vault of the Damned, launched on March 26, 2026.

Earlier this year, Gearbox provided a roadmap of free and paid updates for Borderlands 4; however, all updates were categorized through Q1, Q2, and Q3 release windows, and there was no actual release date. Now we know when the first major content update is arriving: later this month.

Borderlands 4’s Story Pack 1, Mad Ellie and the Vault of the Damned, Releases March 2026

A new Steam post provides details on Borderlands 4 Story Pack 1, including its release date. First and foremost, players will receive a new Vault Hunter called C4SH, who will be partnering up with Ellie for “a self-contained story campaign across the Whispering Glacier.” C4SH is playable across the base game and DLC zones; a full gameplay reveal will arrive on March 16. Additionally, The Whispering Glacier is a new map zone with fresh missions, side missions, activities, and collectibles.

Moreover, players will see the addition of two major boss fights, 15 minibosses, and a new enemy. You will obviously need more firepower to take them on, which is why the Story Pack is introducing 3 Pearlescent weapons and 11 new pieces of Legendary loot, including weapons, gear, and Class Mods. Also, enthusiasts can look forward to 28 new cosmetic items to style their hunters.

Borderlands 4 Story Pack 1 Will Arrive with Shared Progression

The Story Pack 1 update will include a highly anticipated feature: shared progression. This will allow characters on the same account to receive access to map progression, SDU tokens, Hover Drives, cosmetic rewards, and activity progression. However, cross-platform saves will arrive later, not with this update.

In other news, Take-Two has explained why development of Borderlands 4 for Nintendo Switch 2 has been paused. What are your thoughts on Borderlands 4 Story Pack 1? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about a new Escape from Tarkov event that has boosted boss spawns on one major map. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
